REFERENCE: The reference contains multiple typographical errors: 'oCvid-19' instead of 'Covid-19', 'Halfa  Dozrn of the Othed' instead of 'Half a Dozen of the Other', and 'The New England journal of medicine' should be 'The New England Journal of Medicine'. However, the DOI (10.1056/NEJMe2117446) is valid and corresponds to an actual article titled 'Covid-19 mRNA Vaccines — Six of One, Half a Dozen of the Other?' by Rubin and Longo in NEJM (2022, Vol. 386, Issue 2, p. 183-185). Thus, the core reference is authentic but contains garbled text that suggests a transcription or OCR error.
